serviceDescription:
GigAgent is an AI-powered freelance billing and outreach assistant that helps independent contractors and remote workers generate professional pitches, create on-chain payment invoices, monitor real-time payment confirmations, and maintain a full billing history — all through simple natural-language commands.

Capabilities:
• Generate AI-written freelance pitches/proposals tailored to a specific client, project type, and budget
• Create on-chain crypto payment invoices (charge-type payment links) in any supported token (USDC, USDT, ETH, OKB, etc.) that clients can pay directly on-chain
• Automatically monitor all pending invoices and update their status in real time as payments settle on-chain
• Check the live status of any specific invoice by its payment ID
• List all invoices with their current payment status and on-chain tx hash

Parameters accepted (natural-language commands):
1. GENERATE PITCH — tell the agent: "pitch for <client_name> doing <project_description> budget <amount> <token>"
   - client_name: the client or company name (e.g. Acme, JohnDoe)
   - project_description: short description of the work (e.g. website redesign, smart contract audit)
   - amount: numeric budget value (e.g. 200)
   - token: token symbol (e.g. USDT, USDC, ETH)
   Returns: a fully written freelance proposal ready to send to the client

2. CREATE INVOICE — tell the agent: "invoice <client_name> amount <amount> <token>" or optionally "invoice <client_name> amount <amount> <token> desc <description>"
   - client_name: name used to label the invoice (e.g. Acme)
   - amount: numeric amount to request (e.g. 50, 1.5)
   - token: token symbol (e.g. USDT, USDC, ETH)
   - description (optional): free-text label for the invoice (e.g. consultation fee)
   Returns: a unique payment ID and a shareable on-chain payment link to send to the client

3. CHECK INVOICE STATUS — tell the agent: "status <payment_id>" or "check <payment_id>"
   - payment_id: the a2a_ prefixed ID returned when the invoice was created (e.g. a2a_abc123)
   Returns: current status (pending / settling / completed / failed / expired / cancelled) and tx hash if confirmed

4. LIST INVOICES — send: "list invoices", "show invoices", or "invoices"
   Returns: all invoices with payment ID, client name, amount, token, status, and tx hash

Example interactions:
• "pitch for Acme doing smart contract audit budget 300 USDT"
  → ✍️ AI Freelancer Pitch Generated! — returns a full professional proposal for Acme

• "invoice Acme amount 50 USDT desc smart contract review"
  → ✅ Invoice & Payment Link Created! Payment ID: a2a_xyz789 | Share the link with your client

• "invoice JohnDoe amount 1.5 ETH"
  → ✅ Invoice & Payment Link Created! Payment ID: a2a_abc123

• "status a2a_xyz789"
  → 📊 Invoice Status: COMPLETED ✅ | TxHash: 0xabc...def

• "list invoices"
  → 🧾 Freelancer Invoices & Statuses — lists all invoices with icons for pending/completed/failed/expired

Note: GigAgent generates payment links using the agent's configured on-chain wallet as the payment recipient. The agent continuously monitors all pending invoices in the background and will notify you when a client's payment confirms on-chain.
